assets.curation_logic: Prompts selected to balance near-term outreach and market-structure understanding.

emails.subject: Spain signal worth discussing
emails.body: We have been tracking a fresh Spain signal and built a concise view on what it means for your route-to-market assumptions. If useful, I can share the short note and tailored Ko prompt set.
emails.cta_line: Open to me sending the two-minute brief?

linkedin_post.body: Modo's latest market read points to a sharper entry window in Spain. The key is matching signals to the right outreach sequence.

newsletter_blurb.headline: Spain market entry watch
newsletter_blurb.body: A new signal cluster in Spain changed outreach priorities this week. We mapped the top profiles and attached Ko-ready prompts.

video_topic.thesis: The first 30 days in Spain are won by signal speed and grounded outreach.
video_topic.suggested_expert: Market analyst with BESS GTM experience
